params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Name, AccountId, Account.Name, Amount, StageName, ForecastCategory, CloseDate, NextStep, LastStageChangeDate, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c = 'Inside Sales' ORDER BY CloseDate ASC LIMIT 500
